children.text: “Prefer Wi‑Fi” automatically connects to high‑quality Wi‑Fi whenever available.  Read more.
“Prefer Wi‑Fi” automatically connects to high‑quality Wi‑Fi whenever available.  Read more.

Popwifi Connect can connect you automatically at the many millions of places in the Popwifi Network. But you can choose how you want to use WiFi and let the app make smart choices for you!

You can use the Popwifi Network whenever possible or only if your cell signal is lost. Or, you can let the app choose the best available network. Get connected your way!
